name: Reasonable Cause Penalty Abatement

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers who can provide documentation of circumstances (e.g., natural disaster, serious illness, or reliance on erroneous advice) that prevented timely compliance.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides for the complete waiver of failure-to-file and failure-to-pay penalties if the taxpayer can demonstrate the failure was due to reasonable cause and not willful neglect.
